metadata.name: Manage Animal Care and Use Protocol

description: A lab manager needs to submit an annual renewal for an active animal study protocol.

nodes.task_description: Identify the animal protocol that is due for renewal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct protocol in the system.

nodes.task_description: Update the protocol with the number of animals used in the past year and the number requested for the upcoming year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately updates the animal usage numbers.

nodes.task_description: Submit the renewal application to the Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the renewal request.
